function.description: Behavioral coverage for what the UART computes: TX byte serialization, RX byte deserialization, parity, error detection, loopback, break.

bins.description: TX byte transaction observed by scoreboard
RX byte transaction observed by scoreboard

cycle.description: Cycle/handshake/FSM coverage for TX and RX pipelines.

bins.description: Baud tick observed at correct rate

coverage_goals.functional: Legacy alias: function + cycle coverage must both close.
coverage_goals.line: >= 90% instrumented line coverage or explicit project waiver
coverage_goals.branch: >= 85% instrumented branch coverage or explicit project waiver
coverage_goals.fsm: 100% declared TX and RX FSM states and legal transitions covered

{'id': 'ERR_FRAME', 'condition': 'RX stop bit(s) sampled low', 'architectural_effect': 'STAT.frame_err sticky set; DBG_FRAMES_ERR incremented; frame_error interrupt if enabled'}

error_error_0.description: {'id': 'ERR_FRAME', 'condition': 'RX stop bit(s) sampled low', 'architectural_effect': 'STAT.frame_err sticky set; DBG_FRAMES_ERR incremented; frame_error interrupt if enabled'}

plan.description: {'id': 'ERR_PARITY', 'condition': 'RX computed parity != received parity bit', 'architectural_effect': 'STAT.parity_err sticky set; DBG_PARITIES_ERR incremented; parity_error interrupt if enabled'}

error_error_1.description: {'id': 'ERR_PARITY', 'condition': 'RX computed parity != received parity bit', 'architectural_effect': 'STAT.parity_err sticky set; DBG_PARITIES_ERR incremented; parity_error interrupt if enabled'}

plan.description: {'id': 'ERR_OVERRUN', 'condition': 'RX FIFO full when new byte ready to push', 'architectural_effect': 'STAT.overrun_err sticky set; received byte discarded; rx_overrun interrupt if enabled'}

error_error_2.description: {'id': 'ERR_OVERRUN', 'condition': 'RX FIFO full when new byte ready to push', 'architectural_effect': 'STAT.overrun_err sticky set; received byte discarded; rx_overrun interrupt if enabled'}

plan.description: {'id': 'ERR_UNDERRUN', 'condition': 'TX FIFO empty when TX FSM requests next byte during active frame', 'architectural_effect': 'STAT.underrun_err sticky set; frame aborted; tx returns to idle (mark)'}

error_error_3.description: {'id': 'ERR_UNDERRUN', 'condition': 'TX FIFO empty when TX FSM requests next byte during active frame', 'architectural_effect': 'STAT.underrun_err sticky set; frame aborted; tx returns to idle (mark)'}

limitations.rtl_observed_coverage: Functional bins are not covered until a passing scoreboard row with real rtl_observed signals hits them: ccov_perf_fifo_depth, ccov_rx_data, ccov_rx_start_confirm, ccov_tx_data, ccov_tx_idle, cycle_backpressure_0, cycle_backpressure_1, cycle_perf_depth, cycle_perf_frequency_mhz, cycle_perf_outstanding, cycle_pipeline_rx_data, cycle_pipeline_rx_idle, ... +19
limitations.line: SSOT requests line/code coverage, but coverage.info has no DA records.
limitations.branch: SSOT requests branch coverage, but coverage.info has no BRDA/BRF records for this tool flow.

static_universe_not_instrumented.rtl_observed_coverage: Functional bins are not covered until a passing scoreboard row with real rtl_observed signals hits them: ccov_perf_fifo_depth, ccov_rx_data, ccov_rx_start_confirm, ccov_tx_data, ccov_tx_idle, cycle_backpressure_0, cycle_backpressure_1, cycle_perf_depth, cycle_perf_frequency_mhz, cycle_perf_outstanding, cycle_pipeline_rx_data, cycle_pipeline_rx_idle, ... +19
static_universe_not_instrumented.line: SSOT requests line/code coverage, but coverage.info has no DA records.
static_universe_not_instrumented.branch: SSOT requests branch coverage, but coverage.info has no BRDA/BRF records for this tool flow.
